title: Not Enough Weapons
description: This mod adds 8 new weapon types to the game with bonus attributes and effects based on its name.
body:
#### This mod adds 8 new weapon types to the game for every default minecraft tool material. 

(Wood, stone, gold, iron, diamond, netherite)

"club"

"large club"

"dagger"

"glaive"

"greatsword"

"hammer"

"longhammer"

"short sword"

 

So a total of 48 new items.

 

After crafting the item it will get a unique name that will change the power of the weapon.
Currently there are 62 unique names to choose from.

 

#### Attribute and effect bonus:

damage, attack speed, attack knockback, armor, armor toughness, knockback resistance, movement speed, On-Hit Effects (aqua color) and Passive Effects (dark aqua color)

 

The values for these can be changed in the ydmscorex config file.

 

Some effect have summoning or taming effects. (20% on-hit chance)

Like taming spider, zombie, skeleton or summon witch, guard, bat.

 

#### IMPORTANT:

#### This mod uses the YDM's coreX Library

#### So dont forget to download it.
